sections.draft_text: The Supplier will deliver services aligned with ITIL v4 to ensure consistency of service and quality. This includes managing the Commonwealth's server, network, and Application Software effectively. The Supplier will ensure that all technical solutions proposed are compatible with the existing ICT environment and meet the specified requirements.

The Supplier will implement a robust performance management framework, ensuring that all KPIs are met and performance reviews are conducted regularly. Detailed plans will be developed and maintained to guide the project, with regular meetings scheduled to assess progress. Comprehensive reporting will be provided to the Commonwealth in agreed formats.

The Supplier is committed to fulfilling the Australian Industry Capability (AIC) obligations. An AIC Schedule or Plan will be submitted as required, detailing the Supplier's strategy to maximize Australian industry participation.

The Supplier's quotation is structured to meet the Commonwealth's requirements, with pricing information provided in 'Quotation Attachment A'. The Supplier will adhere to the evaluation criteria and is open to discussing alternative proposals that align with the Commonwealth's objectives.

The Supplier confirms compliance with all legal and policy requirements, including the management of Intellectual Property as per the Work Order. The Supplier will adhere to additional standards and demonstrate full compliance with the Digital Service Standard.
